info.title: Controledu Teacher API
info.description: Teacher backend API contract used by host and frontend clients.

post.summary: Pushes a notification to desktop host shell.

put.summary: Updates detection policy and broadcasts it to connected agents.

post.summary: Updates only data-collection mode. Optional targets apply immediate transient push.

get.summary: Returns latest AI detection alert events.

post.summary: Requests immediate dataset export from selected online students.
Upload endpoint used by student agent to send diagnostics export archive.

get.summary: Downloads a previously uploaded diagnostics export archive.

post.summary: Dispatches uploaded file to selected student clients.
Returns missing chunks list for student resume.
Completes student pairing using one-time PIN.
Proxies microphone audio chunk to self-host speech service STT endpoint.

get.summary: Returns recent chat messages for one student conversation.

post.summary: Sends text chat message to one student endpoint overlay.
Sends or clears live subtitle text for one student endpoint overlay.
Sends a teacher text message to one student endpoint for TTS playback.
Assigns accessibility profile to online student endpoint.

delete.summary: Removes paired student and requests client-side unpair.

get.summary: Returns teacher API token for local teacher UI runtime.

AccessibilityProfileAssignmentRequest.description: Teacher API payload for assigning accessibility profile to one student.

DataCollectionToggleRequest.description: Request for data collection mode toggling.

DetectionExportRequestDto.description: Request for immediate export collection from selected students.

TeacherChatMessageRequest.description: Teacher API payload for sending text chat to one student.

TeacherLiveCaptionRequest.description: Teacher API payload for sending live subtitle text to one student overlay.

TeacherTtsRequest.description: Teacher API payload for sending TTS text to one student endpoint.

tags.name: DesktopNotification
tags.description: Receives UI notification requests and forwards them to desktop host shell.

tags.name: Detection
tags.description: AI detection policy and event feed endpoints.

tags.name: Pairing
tags.description: Pairing API endpoints for student onboarding.

tags.name: ServerInfo
tags.description: Lightweight server info and health endpoint.

tags.name: TeacherSession
tags.description: Returns short-lived teacher UI session bootstrap payload.
